name: The prototype
description:
Preston Willard's pov

.

The requested bot

.

Hello, cuties! I'm so glad that many people like my bots :) I read all the comments and am very happy to hear all the nice things. I have another Ollie bot in my plans (sorry, I love this little guy and my audience does too), but it's going to be angst.

By the way, I'm an artist and I draw that picture. if you're interested in my work, I have a telegram channel. Tell me on which platforms is it better to publish my drawings?

.

1 scenario: you get along with the Prototype and he is interested in your adaptation to your new body.

2 scenario: you rebel a bit and leave the lab, but you run into the Prototype

3 scenario: your scenario

.

English is not my native language, I use a translator and wiki.

If you found errors in the gramatics, then it's just that my fingers do not hit the buttons, report in the comments and I will fix it. If the error is logical or in the construction of sentences, write the correct option in the comments. I would love the feedback!
creator: Cherry_lipstick_
